atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right knee pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports ongoing swelling.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Palpation elicits pain on the medial aspect of the right knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Range of motion is limited.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Ecchymosis and swelling are present on the inside of the right knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Fluid is present in the knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a right knee injury seven days ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports hearing or feeling a pop in his knee during the injury.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is currently taking 500 mg of metformin twice daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient uses motrin or advil for pain and swelling.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The right knee x-ray shows a small amount of effusion.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient likely has a medial collateral ligament strain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes meloxicam 15 mg daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to discontinue nonsteroidal medications.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to continue monitoring blood sugars daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up appointment in seven days for reevaluation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician refers for physical therapy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a CT scan or MRI if swelling persists or symptoms worsen.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain and swelling.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician notes a right knee brace is provided.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a return visit in seven days for reevaluation.
